title: AAF Company (Trustee of Army Amenities Fund and Messes Trust Fund)
description: The Army Amenities Fund (AAF) Company is a non for profit company that acts as trustee of Army Amenities Fund and Messes Trust Fund.  The objectives of the Company are to provide amenities to enhance the well being of the soldiers in the Australian Army. This is achieved through a variety of means; however, the focal point is the provision of AAF Company owned holiday facilities and loans and grants for worthwhile projects.
